name: What evidence do I need if Phoenix lawyers used AI wrong for my referral?
description: AI records, emails, timelines, and loss proof essential in AZ.

mainEntity.name: What evidence do I need if Phoenix lawyers used AI wrong for my referral?

acceptedAnswer.text: AI records, emails, timelines, and loss proof essential in AZ.
acceptedAnswer.description: Collect AI prompts/outputs, referral emails, case timelines, and expert opinions on standard care. Arizona requires proof of breach and causation. Key factors: (1) Screenshots of AI interactions; (2) Comparison to proper referral process; (3) Financial loss docs. Subpoena firm records via attorney. Build a chain showing AI error caused harm.
